markdown:
[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline 18TH RoboRacer Autonomous Racing Competition

##### Timeline is subject to change. Please follow announcements in our slack channel for the latest updates.

DATE | IN-PERSON COMPETITION  
---|---  
April 10th |  [Registration Opens](https://forms.gle/2JyDSVsBf25vDnWbA)  
May 10th (Extended to : June 2nd) | Registration Closes  
May 27th 20:00 (GMT+9 / Korea Standard Time) | [F1tenth Orientation 1 ( Competition Rules overview )](https://stanford.zoom.us/j/4680204802?pwd=SFQzV1Vzc1NBci9pNDJLRHJLcGZxQT09)  
[Slide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/10ppWPOif0lmOj4xoRRCkcsY-sDGpdhf6/view?usp=drive_link) [Video](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cmmRzmfXXLmSbnrdTn0hcjWu2bpM3C46/view?usp=sharing)  
June 3rd  | F1tenth Orientation 2 ( Track set up, Track overview for in-person competition, Teams Training )  
June 4th | Qualification Session  
June 5th | Final racing & Award Ceremony  
  
* * *

### 18th RoboRacer Autonomous Racing Competition TimeLine

| Jun 3, 2024 (Landing Room C) | Jun 4, 2024 (Landing Room C) | Jun 5, 2024 (Landing Room C)  
---|---|---|---  
08:00-09:00 | Registration | Last Check for Race | Final Check for Race  
09:00-09:30 | Opening Ceremony & Announcement | Announcement | Announcement  
09:30-10:30 | Team Introduction (2min per team) | Practice | Head-to-Head Race  
10:30-12:00 | Team Mapping (10min per team) | Time Trial Race (5min per team)  
12:00-13:00 | Team Mapping (10min per team) | Lunch | Time Trial Race (5min per team) | Lunch | Head-to-Head Race | Lunch  
13:00-14:00 | Team Mapping (10min per team) | Time Trial Race (5min per team) | Head-to-Head Race  
14:00-15:00 | Practice | Award Cermony  
15:00-16:00 |   
16:00-17:00 | Banquet (Clearing Room)  
17:00-18:00  
18:00-21:00 | Practice | Dinner  
21:00- | Track open all night | Track open all night  
This schedule may change depending on competition conditions.
